---
title: "The Very Rev. John Bramston"
---

## The Very Rev. John Bramston

**Dates:** (1802-1887)

### Description

Vicar of Great Baddow, Essex and Dean of Winchester

### Biography

He married (1832) Clarissa Sandford Trant (1800-1844) and had three children: Clara (1833-1907), wife of the Rev Bixby Garnham Luard (b. 1835) by whom she had 5 sons and 6 daughters;  Mary Eliza (1841-1912); and John Trant (1843-1931).  He married secondly (1845) Anna Hanbury (b.1805/6) and had one daughter Anna Rachel.  He lived at the Deanery, in Winchester Cathedral Close.  He was nephew of Mary Archer Houblon of Hallingbury. [C.G.Luard, <i>Journal of Clarissa Trant</i>;  LG 1906 Luard]

### Letters

- Letter from April10 th [1883]
- Letter from March 27th 1882
- Letter from [1872? 1873?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
